product_overview: Brainzy is an AI-powered study workspace that helps users upload learning materials, ask grounded questions, and generate study aids from those documents. It also supports progress tracking, audio transcription, OCR, summaries, flashcards, practice exams, and flowchart generation.
core_goals: Upload study documents to ground AI-assisted learning
Ask questions and receive document-based answers with citations
Generate and study flashcards from uploaded content
Create and take AI-generated practice exams
Convert audio and images into usable study text
Produce concise summaries and flowcharts from study material

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Users can browse the public marketing page and move to key information sections or launch the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the Features section link -> View the features section -> Click the Unique Capabilities section link -> View the unique capabilities section -> Click the Testimonials section link -> View the testimonials section -> Click the Benefits section link -> View the benefits section -> Click the Launch App action -> See the main workspace at /app

features.name: User Sign Up / Create Account
features.description: Users can create a local account with their name, email, and password and then enter the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the create account form -> Enter a full name -> Enter an email address -> Enter a password -> Submit the form -> See the app open at /app

features.name: User Sign In
features.description: Users can sign in with an existing local account using email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the sign in form -> Enter an email address -> Enter a password -> Submit the form -> See the user session active in the app

features.name: Privacy Policy Modal
features.description: Users can review and accept the privacy policy notice shown on first visit.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the privacy policy notice on first load -> Accept the notice -> Continue using the site -> Open the privacy policy from the footer -> Review the privacy policy notice again

features.name: PDF Document Upload
features.description: Users can upload a PDF to ground the study workspace and move into the main app after processing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the document upload area -> Select a PDF file -> See the file upload and analysis status -> See the upload complete message -> Arrive at /app

features.name: Testimonials & Review Form
features.description: Users can browse testimonials and submit their own review to the public grid.
user_flows: Navigate to /#testimonials -> View existing testimonial cards -> Open the review form -> Enter a name -> Enter a role or department -> Enter a review statement -> Submit the review -> See the new review appear in the testimonials grid

features.name: Doubt Bot Workspace (Main App)
features.description: Users can ask grounded study questions, view cited answers, manage documents, and use a study timer in the main workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Type a question into the chat input -> Submit the question -> View the AI response with citations -> Use the sidebar to switch to another workspace area -> Start the study timer -> Stop the study timer -> Return to the chat area
Navigate to /app -> Type a study question based on uploaded material -> Submit the question -> Review the answer and citations -> Ask a follow-up question -> Review the updated response

features.name: AI Flashcards
features.description: Users can generate interactive flashcards from study documents and review them in a 3D card experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /flashcards -> Generate flashcards -> View the flashcard deck appear -> Flip a flashcard -> Move to the next card -> Move to the previous card -> Mark card difficulty as easy, medium, or hard
Navigate to /flashcards -> Generate flashcards -> Flip multiple cards -> Continue reviewing the deck -> Rate the cards based on difficulty

features.name: Practice Exams
features.description: Users can generate a practice exam, answer questions, and receive scoring and feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /practice-exam -> Generate an exam -> Review the questions -> Select an answer for each question -> View correct or incorrect feedback -> See the final score
Navigate to /practice-exam -> Generate an exam -> Answer several questions -> Continue to the end of the exam -> Review the final result and explanations

features.name: Progress Tracker
features.description: Users can view study analytics and consistency metrics over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /progress -> View the daily progress chart -> View the weekly progress chart -> View the monthly progress chart -> Review session count and consistency metrics

features.name: Audio Recording & Transcription
features.description: Users can record spoken study material and view the transcription as text.
user_flows: Navigate to /audio -> Start recording audio -> Speak into the microphone -> Stop recording audio -> View the transcribed text output

features.name: Vision OCR
features.description: Users can upload an image of notes or textbook content and extract text from it.
user_flows: Navigate to /ocr -> Upload an image file -> Extract the text -> View the extracted text result

features.name: AI Summary Generator
features.description: Users can generate a paragraph summary or bullet summary from study content with configurable detail.
user_flows: Navigate to /summary -> Choose a summary format -> Set the word limit or detail level -> Generate the summary -> View the generated summary text
Navigate to /summary -> Choose bullet format -> Set a shorter word limit -> Generate the summary -> View a concise bullet summary

features.name: Flowchart Generation
features.description: Users can create a flowchart from document content to visualize relationships and processes.
user_flows: Navigate to /flowchart -> Generate a flowchart -> View the rendered flowchart -> Review the structure of the document content

features.name: PWA Install Page
features.description: Users can view instructions for installing the app as a Progressive Web App and trigger installation when available.
user_flows: Navigate to /pwa -> Read the installation instructions -> Use the install prompt when available -> Install the app for offline access

routes.description: Landing page with hero section, features grid, testimonials, benefits, and file upload CTA
Main Brainzy workspace - Doubt Bot chat, study timer, document management
Interactive 3D flashcard study deck generated from documents
AI-generated MCQ and matching practice exams
Study progress tracker with daily/weekly/monthly analytics
Audio recording and transcription tool for lectures/notes
Vision OCR to extract text from handwritten notes or textbook images
AI Summary Generator to create paragraph or bullet-point summaries
PWA installation guide page for offline support
Backend API route integrating Lemma SDK for RAG, document management, and AI operations

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Top navigation bar with links to Features, Unique Capabilities, Testimonials, Benefits sections
user_interactions: Click Features nav link to scroll to features section
Click Unique Capabilities nav link to scroll to section
Click Testimonials nav link to scroll to section
Click Benefits nav link to scroll to section
Click Launch App button to navigate to /app

features.name: User Sign Up / Create Account
features.description: Modal form to create a local account stored in localStorage (email, name, password)
user_interactions: Click Create Account button in header to open signup modal

features.name: User Sign In
features.description: Modal form to sign in with email/password, stored in localStorage
user_interactions: Click Sign In button in header to open sign in modal

features.name: User Sign Out
features.description: Clear user session from localStorage and update header
user_interactions: Click Sign Out button when logged in

features.name: Privacy Policy Modal
features.description: Privacy policy acceptance modal shown on first visit
user_interactions: See privacy modal on first page load
Click Privacy Policy link in footer to reopen modal

features.name: PDF Document Upload
features.description: Upload a PDF file to ground the RAG workspace, redirects to /app after success
user_interactions: Click the file upload area in the CTA section
Select a PDF file from file picker
See success message and redirect to /app

features.name: Testimonials & Review Form
features.description: View testimonials grid and add a new review via inline form
user_interactions: Click Write Review button to open review form
Click Submit to add review to grid

features.name: Doubt Bot Workspace (Main App)
features.description: Chat-based AI Q&A with grounded document context, study timer, and sidebar navigation
user_interactions: Type a message in the chat input field
Click Send button or press Enter to submit question
Click sidebar nav items to switch between features

features.name: AI Flashcards
features.description: Generate and study 3D flip flashcards from document content
user_interactions: Click a flashcard to flip it (3D animation)

features.name: Practice Exams
features.description: AI-generated MCQ practice exam with instant scoring and explanations
user_interactions: Select answer option for each question
See final score at the end

features.name: Progress Tracker
features.description: Study progress analytics with session consistency charts
user_interactions: View session count and consistency metrics

features.name: Audio Recording & Transcription
features.description: Record audio in browser and transcribe to text

features.name: Vision OCR
features.description: Upload image of handwritten notes or textbook and extract text

features.name: AI Summary Generator
features.description: Generate paragraph or bullet-point summary from document content
user_interactions: Set word limit or detail level

features.name: PWA Install Page
features.description: Guide user to install Brainzy as a Progressive Web App

known_limitations.issue: Authentication is localStorage-only, no real backend auth
known_limitations.impact: Sessions are lost on browser data clear; no real security

known_limitations.issue: File upload grounding requires backend Lemma API to be running
known_limitations.impact: Upload CTA will fail without backend service running on correct port
